children.heading: Conservation Area
children.label: 1 Conservation Area
children.text: The term “Conservation Area” means the Gunnison Gorge National Conservation Area, consisting of approximately 57,725 acres surrounding the Gunnison Gorge as depicted on the Map.

children.heading: Map
children.label: 2 Map
children.text: The term “Map” means the map entitled “Black Canyon of the Gunnison National Park and Gunnison Gorge NCA—1/22/99”. The map shall be on file and available for public inspection in the offices of the Department of the Interior.

children.heading: Park
children.label: 3 Park
children.text: The term “Park” means the Black Canyon of the Gunnison National Park established under and depicted on the Map.section 410fff–2 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
